Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_MITU_BATTLE_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Some members are in battle. Do you want to proceed without them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_MITU_MEMBER_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}...I see. Then continue on and we'll rendezvous with them later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_FUKA_BATTLE_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Some of our team members are still fighting. Will you continue without them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_FUKA_MEMBER_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}...All right, understood. Well then, let's keep going![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We'll meet up with anyone staying behind later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_MITU_NPC_INF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4101 0 0}There seems to be a person on this floor. Are you going to leave without them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_UPSTAIR_FUKA_NPC_INF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5092 0 0}Someone is still on this floor! Are you sure you're going to move on?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_Shift01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}Wait. There could be more troublesome foes waiting ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Go ahead with the others. You should keep at least one other person with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_StrongEnemy01_M
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4098 0 0}Something feels different about the floor up ahead![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I sense something more potent... like a tangible force of will. Stay alert.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_StrongEnemy01_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5073 0 0}The floor ahead feels different from the others![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Whatever's there is more powerful than anything before. Be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: DESC_FLOOR21_NG_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4032 0 0}Hold on a moment... All right, the path ahead is safe.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}...And I'm curious what's on the next floor. Please continue forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: DESC_FLOOR21_NG_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Please wait just a second... Okay, it seems safe past here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I'd like to know what's on the next floor. Would it be okay with you to keep going?[n]{f 1 1}
